since_last: 26% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.44% · BTC +2.05% · Gold +1.52% · Nasdaq100 -1.99%. 26% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.16%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.16%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.80%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.77%, AAPL +4.74%, ISRG +4.73%, ADBE +4.23%, ADBE +4.23%. Laggards: TER -12.80%, KLAC -11.92%, CEVA -10.61%, MRVL -10.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.90% at $156.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.90% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
